text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 a.m. and start my day with a glass of water and a short stretching routine. After a quick breakfast, I head to work, where I usually focus on tasks from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. During my lunch break, I often go for a 20-minute walk to stay active. When I get home, I exercise for about 30 minutes—sometimes jogging or doing yoga. Evenings are for dinner, reading, or watching a series. Following this routine consistently helps me feel organized and healthy.
